texto: ...because if there was one thing he didn't like it was big words, they just lied and covered things up, those big words, they didn't let what really was live and breathe but just carried it off into something that wanted to be big, that's what he thought...
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Jon Fosse: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de sentido da existência e experiência vivida. O trecho “...because if there was one thing he didn't like it was big words, they just lied and covered thi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, big-words, verdade pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de verdade e words.
